name: Mullvad VPN

pricing.details: €5/month flat rate. No subscription tiers. Accepts cash, cryptocurrency, and card.

description: Account-free VPN service with flat-rate pricing and a consistent record of no-logging compliance. Accounts are identified by randomly generated numbers; no email address or personal information is required at signup.
rationale: Mullvad accepts anonymous payment methods including cash and Monero. Client applications are open source and have undergone multiple independent audits verifying the no-logs claim. The flat pricing model eliminates upsell pressure and simplifies the trust relationship. RAM-only server infrastructure has been independently confirmed.
